title: Fast Creeper
description: Adds customizable, extremely fast creepers with configurable explosion modes (normal, charged, or End Crystal-level) via gamerules.
body:
# Fast Creeper Mod

Welcome to **Fast Creeper Mod**, an overhaul that starts with creepers and expands to create a more dynamic, challenging, and rewarding Minecraft experience! What began as a simple tweak to make creepers more dangerous has evolved into a multi-faceted mod that will test your survival skills while offering unique rewards and quirky new mechanics.

---

## Key Features

### 💣 Enhanced Creepers
The original core of the mod, this feature makes creepers a relentless and formidable foe.
* **Increased Threat**: Creepers are faster, have more health, and will ignite automatically when you get too close.
* **Constant Pressure**: Periodic waves of creepers will spawn near you, ensuring you can never let your guard down.
* **Three Difficulty Levels**: Use in-game commands to choose your challenge!
    * **Level 1**: Buffed creepers with a chance to be charged.
    * **Level 2**: All buffed creepers are guaranteed to be charged.
    * **Level 3**: All creepers are charged and create a devastating End Crystal-style explosion.

### 🧟 Enhanced Zombies
The chaos spreads to the undead! When enabled via a game rule, zombies become a terrifying new threat.
* **Deadly & Swift**: Zombies deal extra damage and are permanently transformed into their faster baby variants.
* **Speed Boost**: All enhanced zombies get a permanent Speed II effect, making them incredibly difficult to escape.

### 🎁 Timed Block Rewards
To balance the new dangers, this mod rewards you simply for playing.
* **Automatic Rewards**: Every 50 seconds, every player on the server receives a random block.
* **Progressive Loot**: The pool of possible blocks expands as you complete advancements. A new player might get a block of dirt, while a seasoned adventurer who has slain the Ender Dragon could receive a block of netherite!

### 🥕 Crouching Crop Growth
A quirky and useful new farming mechanic with a humorous twist.
* **Accelerated Growth**: Crouching near your crops will make them grow significantly faster.
* **A "Chance" of Gas**: After crouching for one minute, there is a 30% chance for a special event, complete with a low-pitched toot and a cloud of brown particles around your legs.

---

## Chat Commands

You can easily enable or disable the mod's main features by typing simple phrases into the chat.

## 🎮 Commands(This is Gamerule commands)
| Command              | Description                                                        |
|-------------------------------------|--------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `/gamerule fastRandomCreeper true`    | Sets the creeper difficulty to **Level 1** (buffed creepers).      |
| `/gamerule fastRandomCreeperCharged true`    | Sets the creeper difficulty to **Level 2** (all creepers charged). |
| `/gamerule fastRandomCreeperEndCrystal true`    | Sets the creeper difficulty to **Level 3** (charged + End Crystal-style explosions). |

* **Creeper Levels(This is direct Chat Massage to enable gamerule)**:
    * `go to creeper level 1`
    * `go to creeper level 2`
    * `go to creeper level 3`
